name: Magical Glade
flavor: Magestone (Mage Knight) — a place of healing power in the wilds (Magical Glades restore in Mage Knight). A restorative twist on the Object slot.
summary: Activate at the end of a Move in contact (no enemy also touching): remove up to 2 Wounds from the Unit that reached the Glade.

effects.text: Remove up to 2 Wounds from this Unit.
